prompt: A cinematic sci-fi portrait of a person seen from behind in a sterile futuristic laboratory corridor, medium close-up framing from the upper thighs to the head, with the subject turned slightly to the right and looking toward an open vertical pod chamber in the background. The subject has short, wet-looking black hair with messy layered strands and wears a retro-futuristic armored suit: glossy worn red shoulder plates and upper armor, brushed silver metal back plating with rounded panel lines, two flexible ribbed metallic tubes running from the upper back into circular ports, a black shiny undersuit on the arms and sides, a white padded neck seal, and a red waist section with subtle gold trim at the wrist. The armor should feel practical and used, with light scuffs, scratches, and realistic reflections. Place a rectangular privacy blur over the visible side of the face, centered on the head profile. In the background, slightly out of focus, show 1 futuristic standing capsule or medical stasis pod recessed into the wall, dark interior with cool blue vertical accent lights and a bright white overhead light, plus a small control panel mounted on the right side of the pod. The environment is clean and industrial, with pale gray walls, smooth floor, soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, photorealistic textures, realistic metallic materials, subdued cool tones in the room contrasted by the deep red armor, high detail, serious atmosphere, live-action science fiction aesthetic.
